summary: Phase 41 testing complete. All backend APIs pass (7/7). Frontend features working: Track Order page with phone verification, Order Confirmation with OrderCodeCard + copy + track CTA, Admin Distribution Margin page with pricing layers and split validation, Mobile bottom sheet for PhoneNumberField, Products page loads, Login page shows full logo with tagline, Footer shows BrandLogo with SVG triad. Minor issue: 'Margin & Distribution' sidebar link defined in admin-sidebar-links.js but not in adminNavigation.js (page accessible via direct URL).

issues: 'Margin & Distribution' link defined in admin-sidebar-links.js but not added to adminNavigation.js - page accessible via direct URL /admin/distribution-margin but not visible in sidebar navigation

action_items: Add 'Margin & Distribution' link to adminNavigation.js under Configuration or Growth section to make it visible in admin sidebar
critical_code_review_comments: admin-sidebar-links.js has the link but adminNavigation.js (used by AdminSidebar.jsx) doesn't - need to sync these configs

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all features work, minor sidebar link missing)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 41 Distribution Margin Engine fully functional. Backend APIs: GET/PUT settings, POST preview all working with correct pricing math (vendor=10000 → final=13000). Frontend: Track Order page has phone verification with mobile bottom sheet, Order Confirmation has OrderCodeCard with copy, Admin Distribution Margin page has all inputs and preview. Only issue: sidebar link not visible (needs to be added to adminNavigation.js).

track_order_page.description: Track Order page with search form, phone verification, help section

order_confirmation_page.description: Order Confirmation with OrderCodeCard, copy action, track CTA

distribution_margin_api_get_settings.evidence: Returns konekt_margin_pct=20, distribution_margin_pct=10, affiliate_pct=4, sales_pct=3, discount_pct=3

distribution_margin_api_preview.evidence: vendor=10000, konekt=20%, dist=10% => final=13000, affiliate_commission=400, sales_commission=300

distribution_margin_api_put_settings.evidence: Saves valid settings, rejects over-allocated split (13% > 10%)

admin_distribution_margin_page.description: Admin page with pricing layers, distribution split, save/preview buttons

admin_sidebar_margin_link.evidence: Link defined in admin-sidebar-links.js but not in adminNavigation.js - page accessible via direct URL

phone_number_field_desktop.description: PhoneNumberField shows native select on desktop

phone_number_field_mobile_bottom_sheet.description: PhoneNumberField shows bottom sheet trigger on mobile
phone_number_field_mobile_bottom_sheet.evidence: data-testid='track-phone-prefix-mobile' visible, 'bottom-sheet-overlay' opens with country options

bottom_sheet_select_component.description: BottomSheetSelect renders with backdrop and options

affiliate_card_component.description: AffiliateCard with promo code and referral link copy buttons

products_page.evidence: data-testid='products-page' found, products displayed with TZS prices

login_page_logo.description: Login page shows full logo with tagline
login_page_logo.evidence: data-testid='brand-logo' found, 'Business Procurement Simplified' tagline present

footer_brand_logo.description: Footer shows BrandLogo with SVG triad
footer_brand_logo.evidence: data-testid='brand-logo' and SVG found in footer
